sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْمُبَكِّرُ يُسَاعِدُ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ فِي الدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rani odlazak na spavanje pomaže u koncentraciji tokom učenja.
sentences.translationEn: Sleeping early helps with concentration in studies.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْإِنْسَانُ إِلَى ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ الرَّاحَةِ لَيْلًا.
sentences.translation: Čovjeku je potrebno osam sati odmora noću.
sentences.translationEn: A person needs eight hours of rest at night.

sentences.arabic: تُرِيحُ الْعَيْنَ وَالْعَقْلَ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ طَوِيلٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: To odmara oči i um nakon dugog radnog dana.
sentences.translationEn: It rests the eyes and the mind after a long day of work.
